[[File:Heavy ballista detail.png|left|200px]]
The '''heavy ballista''' is a two-handed [[Crossbow (weapon)|crossbow]] that uses [[javelin]]s as ammunition, requiring level 75 in [[Ranged]] and the completion of the quest [[Monkey Madness II]] to wield. Players must also accept both [[Duke (monkey)|Duke]] and [[Daero]]'s training in order to make use of it, unlike the [[light ballista]]. Attempting to equip the ballista without these requirements results in the message {{mes|You must have completed Monkey Madness II and the advanced combat training from Duke to be able to wield this weapon.}}. While there is no direct Defence requirement for the heavy ballista, completing the required training from Daero after [[Monkey Madness I]] will provide a minimum of 20,000 Defence experience. This corresponds to an effective level requirement of 33 Defence.

It is created by using [[ballista limbs]] on a [[heavy frame]], then using the resulting [[incomplete heavy ballista]] on a [[ballista spring]], and finally adding the [[monkey tail]] on an [[unstrung heavy ballista]]. The entire process requires 72 [[Fletching]] and grants 660 experience.

The speed on accurate is one tick slower than a godsword (7 ticks), but when put on rapid it matches the speed of a godsword (6 ticks). The ballista has an attack range of 9. Longrange increases attack range by 1.

Players may combine a heavy ballista with a [[heavy ballista ornament kit]] to create a [[heavy ballista (or)]].

[[Ava's device]] picks up fired [[javelin]]s.

==Special attack==
[[File:Concentrated Shot (heavy ballista).gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the heavy ballista's special attack, ''Concentrated Shot''.]]
The heavy ballista has a [[special attack]], ''Concentrated Shot'', which it shares with the [[light ballista]]. It performs an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage.

The special attack consumes 65% of the player's special attack energy.

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 29 May 2024
|update = Project Rebalance: Combat Changes
|change = [[Ava's devices]] now picks up [[Javelins]]
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 1 December 2016
|update = Ballista Rework & QOL
|change = The heavy ballista's ranged attack bonus was changed from 110 to 125 and it was given 15 ranged strength bonus. It was also given the requirements of 75 [[Ranged]] and completion of [[Monkey Madness II]] to wield.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 3 November 2016
|update = Last Man Standing & QoL
|change = The ranged attack bonus was changed from 100 to 110.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 31 October 2016
|change = The ranged attack bonus was changed from 120 to 100 and ranged strength of javelins reduced as it was deemed too powerful with [[Void Knight equipment]]. The delay between the projectile hitting the player and the damage hitsplat appearing has been removed. Previously, there was a delay that allowed a ballista hit and other weapon special attacks to stack in quick succession.
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}

==Trivia==
*The special attack tooltip stating that it has a 2.4 second delay to attack is false; there is no extra delay associated with the special attack.
